description: Provides income support of ₹6,000 per year to all land-holding farmer families across India in three equal instalments of ₹2,000 every four months, directly transferred to their bank accounts.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year financial assistance in 3 instalments
Direct benefit transfer (DBT) to bank account
No intermediary, funds directly deposited
Covers all land-holding farmer families

description: Provides comprehensive insurance coverage for crop loss due to natural calamities, pests and diseases at extremely low premium rates. Farmers pay only 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi and 5% for commercial/horticultural crops.
benefits: Crop insurance at very low premium (1.5–5%)
Coverage for all natural calamities, pests, diseases
Post-harvest losses covered for 14 days
Technology-driven fast claim settlement
Cashless hospitalisation not applicable — financial compensation for crop loss

description: Provides short-term credit to farmers for agricultural inputs, post-harvest expenses, allied activities and personal consumption needs at concessional interest rates. Credit limit up to ₹3 lakh at 7% interest (effective 4% with subvention).
benefits: Revolving credit up to ₹3 lakh at 7% interest p.a.
Effective interest rate 4% with prompt repayment subvention
Covers seeds, fertilisers, pesticides, post-harvest expenses
Personal accident insurance cover of ₹50,000
Flexible repayment – aligned with crop seasons

scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat – Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: World's largest government-funded health assurance scheme offering ₹5 lakh cashless hospitalisation cover per family per year for secondary and tertiary care at empanelled public and private hospitals.
benefits: Up to ₹5 lakh cashless hospitalisation per family per year
Covers pre and post-hospitalisation expenses
Over 1,393 medical procedures covered
Portable benefit across India – use in any empanelled hospital
No premium paid by beneficiary
application_centers: Any empanelled hospital Arogya Mitra desk

description: Provides financial assistance to BPL rural households to construct their own pucca houses. Beneficiaries receive ₹1.20 lakh (plain areas) or ₹1.30 lakh (hilly/difficult areas) with MGNREGS labour wages support.
benefits: ₹1.20 lakh grant in plain areas, ₹1.30 lakh in hilly areas
90/95 person-days MGNREGS wages for construction labour
Sanitation grant of ₹12,000 under SBM-G
Piped water connection under Jal Jeevan Mission
Direct bank transfer in instalments

description: National mission to ensure comprehensive financial inclusion by providing universal banking access. Every account comes with a RuPay debit card offering ₹2 lakh accidental insurance cover and ₹10,000 overdraft facility.
benefits: Zero-balance savings bank account
RuPay Debit Card with ₹2 lakh accidental insurance
Life cover of ₹30,000 for eligible beneficiaries
Overdraft facility up to ₹10,000
Direct benefit transfer for all government schemes
required_documents: Any government-issued photo ID (Voter ID / Passport / Driving Licence)

description: Provides collateral-free micro-enterprise loans under three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,001–5 lakh), and Tarun (₹5–10 lakh) to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh
Three tiers: Shishu (₹50K), Kishore (₹5L), Tarun (₹10L)
Competitive interest rates (linked to MCLR)
No processing fee for Shishu loans
Mudra RuPay card for business expenses
required_documents: Bank statements (last 6 months) for existing businesses
application_centers: Any public sector or private bank

description: Flagship skill training scheme enabling Indian youth to take industry-relevant skill training, get certified and earn better livelihood. Offers free short-duration skill training with monetary rewards and third-party certified assessment.
benefits: Free short-duration skill training (150–300 hours)
Monetary reward of ₹500–8,000 upon certification
Industry-recognized certification
Placement assistance after training
Training in 300+ job roles across 40+ sectors
application_centers: National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC) training centres

description: A guaranteed pension scheme for workers in the unorganised sector. Subscribers receive guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000–5,000 after age 60 depending on contribution amount and age at joining.
benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000–5,000 after age 60
Spouse receives same pension on subscriber's death
Nominee receives full corpus on spouse's death
Government co-contribution: 50% of contribution (max ₹1,000/year) for first 5 years
Available to all unorganised sector workers
required_documents: Mobile number linked with bank account
application_centers: Any bank branch with savings account

description: A one-year renewable life insurance scheme offering ₹2 lakh death cover at just ₹330 per year premium. Covers death due to any reason for people aged 18–50 years having a savings bank account.
benefits: ₹2 lakh life insurance cover at only ₹330/year premium
Covers death due to any reason (not just accident)
Auto-renewable annually
Simple enrolment through bank
Death claim directly to nominee's bank account

description: Accident insurance scheme offering ₹2 lakh for accidental death or total permanent disability and ₹1 lakh for partial permanent disability at just ₹20 per year for persons aged 18–70.
benefits: ₹2 lakh cover for accidental death / total permanent disability
₹1 lakh for partial permanent disability
Premium: only ₹20 per year
Auto-debit from savings account
Simple enrolment via bank or SMS

description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services or trading sector.
benefits: Composite loan of ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore
Covers 75% of project cost
Repayment up to 7 years with moratorium of 18 months
Working capital component included
RuPay debit card for working capital
required_documents: Income proof / ITR (last 2 years if applicable)

description: Provides central assistance to urban poor to enable them to own pucca houses. Offers interest subsidy under Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS) – up to ₹2.67 lakh effective subsidy for EWS/LIG beneficiaries.
benefits: Interest subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh (EWS/LIG)
Benami transactions prohibited – house in woman's name
Covers new construction, purchase and extension
Loan amount: EWS ₹6L, LIG ₹12L, MIG-I ₹9L, MIG-II ₹12L
Central assistance of ₹1.5 lakh for in-situ slum redevelopment

description: Provides social assistance to BPL elderly, widows, disabled persons and bereaved families. Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS) provides ₹200–500/month to persons aged 60+.
benefits: Old age pension ₹200/month (60–79 years)
Old age pension ₹500/month (80+ years)
Widow pension ₹300/month
Disability pension ₹300/month
One-time family benefit ₹20,000 on death of primary breadwinner
required_documents: Age proof (birth certificate / school certificate / Aadhaar)

description: National initiative to address declining child sex ratio and related gender discrimination by promoting the survival, protection and education of the girl child. Provides educational support and awareness programs.
benefits: Sukanya Samriddhi Account with 8.2% interest (tax-free)
Educational support for girl child
Scholarships and incentives for continuing education
Community awareness and gender sensitisation programs
Financial inclusion support for women
required_documents: Bank account / post office account details
application_centers: Post offices for Sukanya Samriddhi Account

description: Provides maternity benefit of ₹5,000 in three instalments to pregnant women and lactating mothers for the first living child, to partly compensate for wage loss and to improve health and nutrition outcomes.
benefits: Cash benefit of ₹5,000 in 3 instalments
1st instalment: ₹1,000 at early pregnancy registration
2nd instalment: ₹2,000 after minimum one antenatal check-up
3rd instalment: ₹2,000 after child birth registration and vaccination
Covers loss of wages during pregnancy and childbirth

description: Aims to reduce poverty by enabling poor households to access profitable occupations and social protection through Self-Help Groups (SHGs). Provides revolving funds, bank credit linkages and skill training to rural poor.
benefits: Revolving fund of ₹10,000–15,000 per SHG
Bank credit linkage: ₹1–10 lakh per SHG
Interest subvention: 7% or 4% for NE states
Skill development and employability training
Community managed social security through SHGs

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
description: Provides 5 kg of free foodgrain (rice/wheat) per person per month to all National Food Security Act (NFSA) beneficiaries, covering about 80 crore people across India under the One Nation One Ration Card scheme.
benefits: 5 kg free foodgrain (rice/wheat/millets) per person per month
Portable benefit under One Nation One Ration Card
No cost to beneficiary – completely free
Covers approx. 80 crore beneficiaries nationwide
Available at any PDS shop across India with Aadhaar
required_documents: Mobile number linked to Aadhaar (for OTP-based)

description: Provides free LPG connections to BPL women to protect health and reduce indoor air pollution from use of traditional cooking fuels. Includes free connection, first refill and hotplate to BPL households under SECC 2011.
benefits: Free LPG connection (deposit-free)
First refill cylinder free
Free hotplate/stove
Protection from indoor air pollution
Loan facility for first refill (repaid via refill subsidy)
required_documents: Aadhaar Card (applicant – woman of the household)
Ration card with family members listed
application_centers: Nearest LPG distributor (HP / Bharat / Indane Gas)

scheme_name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
description: Legally guarantees 100 days of wage employment per financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work. Provides unemployment allowance if work is not provided within 15 days.
benefits: Guaranteed 100 days of employment per household per year
Statutory minimum wages paid (state-specific)
Unemployment allowance if work denied within 15 days
Work provided within 5 km of household
Payment directly to bank/post office account within 15 days
required_documents: Job card (issued free by Gram Panchayat)
Bank account or post office account
